{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303490311E06E18386C5DB3BC32"}"},"total":618},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7447536141865272126","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第四天灾沙雕群相，质量很好，大多第四天灾只为主角开外挂开金手指，其实还不如这书，玩家都很现实，有钞能力的用钞能力，没钞能力的靠自己能力，","text_exts":[{"e":4,"s":0,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742089435DB3BC32%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227447536141865272126%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227367672968660405273%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734017413,"group_id":"7367672968660405273","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小说迷","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9TsSmft2dzCgRGPC8iNo0c=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"71543215751","user_name":"泉州阿本"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"71543215751","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7367672968660405273","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主】【无暧昧】【无后宫】【群像】【苟王】
迟敬没想到一生平凡毫无亮点的自己会有一天成为“天选之子”而穿越异世！还是个已经被无数丧尸异形占领的异世！他拒绝这种强买强卖！起票！他要回蓝星！身为废物宅男的他一天都活不下去好吧！正绝望之际发现自己穿越主角的金手指终于到货了。一个可以召唤本世界生物的传送器！
